task: hydrocarbon-bearing formation identification and potential pay recommendation
input: well logging data (multiple dimensions and scales) and well logging knowledge graph
output: identification of hydrocarbon-bearing formations and ranked list of potential pay zones
backbone: Knowledge-Powered Neural Network (graph embedding + neural network)
key_idea: integrates domain expertise via a well logging knowledge graph with graph embedding and neural network for formation evaluation
datasets: 547 wells from Chang 6 Member, Triassic, Jiyuan Block, Ordos Basin
metrics: coincidence rate for oil testing layers
